title: Taj Hotels is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Taj Hotels is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Taj Hotels! We are hiring a Guest Relations Manager for our Ludhiana team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Taj Hotels:
Taj Hotels is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Taj Hotels!
